tools.name: CRAFT - the perfect prompt
tools.primaryUseCase: C.R.A.F.T. stands for Character, Relevance, Ask, Format, Tone — a simple method to create powerful AI prompts that actually get the job done.

tools.name: Newton - General SGM Helper
tools.primaryUseCase: A GPT that has lots of different information about a range of SGM related topic. This is a direct copy of the one provided to clients.

tools.name: Content Pyramind - Production Helper
tools.primaryUseCase: Turn your thought leadership content into all the different content types needed to help promote on SGM channels.

tools.name: SGM Handbook
tools.primaryUseCase: A GPT that has all the information from the company handbook

tools.name: GRT Vision Builder GPT
tools.primaryUseCase: Helps build out GRT visions for the team

tools.name: GRT Strategy Tracker
tools.primaryUseCase: Helps build out the strategy for the team in the correct SMART format used in the strategy tracker

tools.name: Person Analyser
tools.primaryUseCase: Scrapes a users LinkedIn profile and analyses it creating a 1 page document so you can get to know them quickly

tools.name: ColourWorks Communicator
tools.primaryUseCase: It helps me create emails in the right tone to suit the colour of the personality.

tools.name: SGM B Corp Advisor
tools.primaryUseCase: Our specialist B Corp advisor GPT

tools.name: Client Scoring Matrix
tools.primaryUseCase: Evaluates clients on ethics, sustainability, B Corp status, with company overview, mission, values, and competitors, in a structured report format.

tools.name: FI2R | From Ideas to Results
tools.primaryUseCase: A GPT to create the F12R scripts using pod input from the monthly internal SGM form.

tools.name: Client Meeting Note Follow Up
tools.primaryUseCase: Meeting note helper to turn meeting notes into well structured notes and a follow up email

tools.name: Ideation Checker
tools.primaryUseCase: Analyzes blog titles for similarity and suggests internal links.

tools.name: Sheet Helper
tools.primaryUseCase: Answers basic Google Sheets formula questions.

tools.name: Paid Sales Bot
tools.primaryUseCase: Assists with sales observations on Google Ads, structuring insights for slide decks, answering detailed questions, and providing performance improvement recommendations.

tools.name: Colour Communicator
tools.primaryUseCase: Helps you communicate effectively with different colour profiles, rewriting your content in a style that will resonate with that colour

tools.name: 1. Fact Find prep
tools.primaryUseCase: Takes customer data and does some research to prepare the team for the fact find call

tools.name: 2. Move to pitch stage
tools.primaryUseCase: Structures and refines fact-find information into a complete, pitch-ready brief, ensuring all required inputs are captured, clarified, and formatted for seamless handover into proposal development.

tools.name: 3. Onboarding Client
tools.primaryUseCase: Structures and validates client onboarding data post-sale, generating clear scope of work, service plans, and delivery phases to support smooth handover from commercial to client services.

tools.name: Persona Pitch
tools.primaryUseCase: Collects structured client inputs for buyer persona creation, validates completeness, confirms details with the user, and submits finalized data to an N8N webhook for automated persona generation workflows.

tools.name: Style My Content
tools.primaryUseCase: Takes disorganised, unformatted content and transforms it into a fully styled out document aligned with Sleeping Giant Media's branding.

tools.name: Persona Analysis
tools.primaryUseCase: Analyse conversation transcripts to profile individuals’ communication style, values, and behaviour, helping sales teams understand personalities and tailor messaging for more effective, targeted client engagement.

tools.name: Jonny's Sales Assistant
tools.primaryUseCase: Supports Jonny Connolly’s sales workflow by transforming raw notes into structured CRM entries, drafting client communications, and creating internal briefs aligned with Sleeping Giant Media’s processes and goals.

tools.name: Contract Law Advisor
tools.primaryUseCase: Provides UK-law contract drafting, review, and risk analysis for Sleeping Giant Media, ensuring agreements align with internal templates, commercial terms, and best practice.

tools.name: Chachi Petey: Outreach Assistant
tools.primaryUseCase: Transforms messy sales notes into structured CRM summaries, creates internal briefs, and drafts outreach—supporting Sleeping Giant Media’s sales, prospecting, and relationship-building workflows with clear, actionable content.

tools.name: Cold Outreach Assistant
tools.primaryUseCase: Generate concise, high-converting cold outreach emails and call scripts targeting digital marketing pain points, helping businesses improve lead generation, ROI, and campaign performance with clear, compelling calls to action.

tools.name: Single GEO Audit
tools.primaryUseCase: Carries out a single GEO audit on a given website URL will currently produce a SGM branded PDF
